settings.text:
Better Than Ever! JPS Club levels up the excitement – shop and enjoy unbeatable perks for all JPS Club members!

Exclusive benefits by membership tier: JPS gets 5% off, JPS Plus gets 10% off, and JPS X gets 10% off + earn double points!

How to get a special offer

  • JPS Club members must log in before placing an order.
  • This promotion applies exclusively to participating items.
  • The discount will be displayed at the checkout page.
  • All prices listed are after applicable discounts.
  • Fragrances are excluded from this promotion.
  • Your CPSChaps.com account must be linked to your JPS Club account. For instructions on linking your accounts, please visit: www.cpschaps.com/how-to-link-your-online-account-to-jps-club.
  • Promotional items are non-refundable and non-exchangeable.
  • **This promotion is exclusive to JPS Club members only.

Terms and conditions

  • By participating in this promotion, you confirm that you have read and agreed to the terms and conditions outlined on our website. For more information, please visit: www.cpschaps.com/en/terms-and-conditions
  • The company reserves the right to reject any returned or exchanged items, including promotional items, in any circumstance.
  • Shipping cost is not included.
  • The offers cannot be exchanged for cash or other items or transferred to others.
  • Find further details about our returns and exchanges policy at www.cpschaps.com/en/faq
  • For additional information, don't hesitate to contact us at Tel: 02-118-2000 or email: customerservice@jaspal.co.th. Our office hours are Monday through Sunday, 09:00 to 18:00.
